title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. AND CITIZENS NATIONAL CORPORATION ANNOUNCE DEFINITIVE MERGER AGREEMENT
author: Prnewswire
description: Peoples Bancorp Inc. (NASDAQ: PEBO) has agreed to acquire Citizens National Corporation (OTCPK: CZNL) in a cash and stock transaction valued at approximately $76.6 million. Under the merger agreement, Citizens shareholders will receive 2.10 shares of Peoples common stock plus $8.00 in cash per share. The acquisition is expected to close in the second half of 2026 and is projected to be immediately accretive to Peoples' earnings with a tangible book value earnback of less than one year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The acquisition is expected to be immediately accretive to earnings, expand Peoples' footprint in Kentucky, strengthen its deposit base, and maintain flexibility to stay under $10 billion in assets. The deal offers strong financial metrics with tangible book value earnback of less than one year and internal rate of return exceeding 20%.

Citizens shareholders will receive a defined consideration of 2.10 shares of Peoples stock plus $8.00 cash per share, valued at $78.39 per share. The merger with a larger, well-established community bank provides Citizens stakeholders with access to more locations, products, and services while maintaining cultural alignment.

title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Peoples Bancorp Inc. (NASDAQ: PEBO) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.42 per common share, a 2% increase from the previous quarter, payable on May 18, 2026. The dividend represents approximately $15.0 million, or 51.7% of first quarter 2026 earnings, with an annualized yield of 4.89% based on the April 17 closing price of $34.36.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company increased its quarterly dividend by 2% ($0.01 per share), demonstrating confidence in financial performance and commitment to shareholder returns. The dividend payout of 51.7% of Q1 earnings is sustainable, and the 4.89% annualized yield is attractive for income investors. The company's $9.6 billion in assets and 144 locations across multiple states indicate financial stability and growth.

title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Peoples Bancorp Inc. (NASDAQ: PEBO) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per common share, payable on February 17, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 2, 2026. The dividend represents approximately $14.6 million, or 46.1% of the company's fourth quarter 2025 earnings, with an annualized yield of 5.25% based on the January 16, 2025 closing price of $31.21.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly dividend with a solid 5.25% annualized yield and maintains a healthy payout ratio of 46.1% of Q4 2025 earnings, indicating financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. The company's substantial asset base of $9.6 billion and extensive branch network demonstrate operational strength.

title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Peoples Bancorp Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per common share, payable on November 18, 2025, representing approximately 49.7% of its third quarter 2025 earnings with an annualized yield of 5.83%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a consistent dividend, has $9.6 billion in total assets, operates 145 locations across multiple states, and aims to be the 'Best Community Bank in America', indicating financial stability and growth

title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Peoples Bancorp Inc. (PEBO) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per common share, payable on May 19, 2025, to shareholders of record on May 5, 2025. The dividend represents a payout of approximately $14.6 million, or 60.1% of Peoples' reported first quarter 2025 earnings.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly cash dividend, indicating financial stability and shareholder returns.
